name: EventHandler - AddSkillAfterMovement
description: Verify AddSkillAfterMovement EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Find AddSkillAfterMovement handler in array
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "effect.drive_by", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { var type = h.GetType().Name; if(type == "AddSkillAfterMovement") { found = true; break; } } found

steps.name: Verify _type field readable
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "effect.drive_by", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { try { var typeField = h.GetType().GetField("_type"); if(typeField != null) { found = true; break; } } catch {} } found

steps.name: Read Effect parameter field
steps.code: var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", "effect.drive_by", "EventHandlers"); var found = false; foreach(var h in (System.Collections.IEnumerable)handlers) { try { var field = h.GetType().GetField("Effect"); if(field != null) { found = true; break; } } catch {} } found
